title: Close Call Extreme
description:
Close Call Extreme is a fast, stylish arcade dodger where you slip through traffic, skim past bumpers by a pixel, and chase those long, heart-pounding high-score runs.

It is inspired by classic arcade racers and the kind of high-speed, high-focus driving games many of us grew up with, including endless racers from the C64 era like LeMans. 

Every close call matters, and one mistake might end it all.

 

GAMEPLAY

• Endless, high-speed arcade driving where every near-miss boosts your score

• Chain close calls to build massive combos and extend your run

• No brakes; only speed, control, and nerve

• Crash takes you to pit, slows you down

MASTER THE CLOSE CALL

• Precision matters more than speed

• Track changes will test your focus

• Staying calm is part of the challenge 

ONE MORE RUN

Close Call Extreme is built for short sessions, long streaks, and that just one more try feeling.
Focus, take risks, and see how far you can push it.
description_short: Close Call Extreme is a fast, stylish arcade dodger about weaving through traffic, skimming past cars by a pixel, and chasing addictive high-score runs. So let's start... those... ENGINES!
